metadata.statute: Md. Code, Courts & Judicial Proceedings Section 11-107(a)

annual_rate.notes: Post-judgment interest under Md. Code, Courts & Judicial Proceedings Section 11-107(a) — 10% per year, fixed by statute (simple interest). Under the "except as provided in Section 11-106" clause, a money judgment on a contract for a loan of money carries interest at the RATE CHARGED IN… Verify against the statute; not legal advice.
